titleStmt.title: SII 41.182: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 182. (A.R. No. 400 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On another pillar in the maṇḍapa in front of the Varadarāja perumāḷ temple at Kāvēripākkam,

summary.p: [Published in SII, XIII, No. 312, pp. 165-6, where the king is tentatively taken to be Rājarāja I]

The sabhā of Kavidippākkam alias Avaṉinārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam, comprising the members of ūr-vāriyam, udāsīna-vāriyam, ēri-vāriyam, and kaḻani-vāriyam, the bhaṭṭas and the viśishṭas met at the Kāmakkōṭṭam and decided, as directed by the officer Veṇpaikkuḍināṭṭu-vēḷār delegated by the king, that they should not carry out any of their routine activities (karaṇam) on the days of saṃgrānti, new moon and full moon; and on other days too, the activities should not be performed along with women representing their husbands. In the later case, the concerned male members were bound to be present for the particular proceedings. This decision was ordered to be executed under the supervision of the ‘ruler of the village’ (ūr-mēl niṟkum-kō) and the members of the samvatsara-vāriyam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . [korājakesari]varmmaṟkku yāṇṭu
Irupattañcāvatu paṭuvūrkoṭṭattuk kāvitippākkamākiya A
vaṉinārāyaṇaccaturrvvetimaṅkalattu Ivvāṭṭaikaḷum Udāsiṉavārikapperumakkaḷum Erivāri
kapperumakkaḷum kaḻaṉivārikapperumakkaḷum[ bhaṭṭarka] ḷum
viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom kāmakkoṭṭatte
kūṭiirukkap perumāṉaṭikaḷ Ariḷippāṭṭāl veṇpaiykkuṭi nā
ṭṭuveḷār vantu . nuṅkaḷukku Epperppaṭṭa karaṇaṅkaḷum samgrā
ntiyum Uvāvum pratipatamum karaṇaṅkaḷum peṟātatākavum maṟṟu
m Epperpaṭṭaṉa kāṭṭumiṭattum puruṣaraiyum strikaḷaik koṇṭu
pontu Ampalattup peṟātārākavum strikaḷaiy koṇṭu
potuvār perumāṉaṭikaḷukkum sabhaiyārkkum piḻaittārāka
vum Ipparicu vyavasdhaiyāka śilāle
khai ceykaveṉṟu perumāṉaṭikaḷaruḷucce
ytār niṅkaḷum Ipparice śilālekhai
ceyka[*]veṉṟu Iveṇpaiykkuṭināṭṭuveḷār ma
hāsabhaiyārkku vantu coṉṉamaiyil Ep
perpaṭṭa karaṇaṅkaḷum saṅgrāntiyum Uvāvum
pratipatamum Innāḷāl kāṇappeṟap peṟātatā
kavum karaṇaṅkaḷ kāṭṭiṉaviṭattum maṟṟu Ep
perpaṭṭatum kāṭṭumiṭattuṅ kāṭṭappaṭṭa puruṣarai
y koṇṭu poruvarākavum [puruṣarai] kāṇāviṭi
lum strikaḷaik koṇṭu potappeṟātārāka
vum koṇṭu pontār sabhaiyomukkumpe
rumānaṭikaḷukkum piḻaittārākavum Ipparicu
Avvavāṭṭai samvastaravārikapperumakka
ḷum Ūrmel niṟkuṅkovum Ipparicu vyava
sdhai niṟuttuvārākavum Ipparicu Emmil I
rājāvin niyokam pukkum māvum Irāja
kāryyayamum grāmakāryyamum tiruttappeṟātatākavum Ivvampala
ttaṟutiṟattu vārikapperumakkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa ma[hāsabhaiyo]m mi
kkuṟiyuḷḷiruntu paṇikkaeḻutiṉeṉ mastadya ta
Digital edition of SII 41.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
